message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles, Gem, Scroll, Skull } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Paradox Roblox: Ultimate Unit Evolution & Code Guide 2026",
  description: "Master Anime Paradox on Roblox with our comprehensive guide for 2026. Learn about unit evolution, the best meta units like Stark and Sid, active codes for free gems and rerolls, and essential farming strategies to dominate the game.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/800080/fff?text=Anime+Paradox+Guide",
  date: "2026-02-01",
  author: "Anime Paradox Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Anime Paradox Roblox** offers deep unit customization and strategic combat, crucial for 2026 success.
- **Stark (Resurreccion)** and **Sid (Atomic)** are top-tier Paradox and Secret units, essential for endgame dominance.
- Redeem **active codes** regularly for free gems and trait rerolls to significantly boost your progress.
- Efficiently **farm gems** by resetting Infinite mode at Wave 6 and completing Story Mode Nightmare.
- Prioritize **evolving beginner units** like Ciel (Super) for a strong early game foundation and smooth progression.
- Understand unit **traits** and **synergies** to build an unstoppable team.
</Callout>

Welcome, aspiring Anime Paradox players! If you're diving into the vibrant world of **Anime Paradox Roblox**, you're in for an exciting journey filled with powerful units, strategic battles, and endless customization. This guide is your ultimate companion for mastering the game in 2026, offering insights into everything from evolving your most formidable units to leveraging active codes for free rewards. Whether you're aiming to dominate the leaderboards with meta units like Stark and Sid or simply looking to optimize your farming routes, we've got you covered. Get ready to unlock the full potential of your squad and conquer every challenge Anime Paradox throws your way!

<Section icon={Swords} title="Mastering Paradox Units: Stark & Sid Evolution">

In **Anime Paradox Roblox**, Paradox and Secret units represent the pinnacle of power, capable of turning the tide of any battle. Understanding their unique abilities and evolution paths is key to building a truly formidable team. Two standout units, Stark (Resurreccion) and Sid (Atomic), consistently rank at the top for their unparalleled damage, range, and unique utility. Evolving these units requires specific materials and a deep understanding of their potential.

**Video Highlights: Stark's Resurrection Evolution**
- Stark's evolution to Resurreccion significantly boosts his damage, range, and introduces new abilities.
- His "Resurrect Meter" increases damage and range, gaining a massive bonus if no allies are in range.
- The "Wolf Pack" ability summons wolves, providing additional damage and utility.
- Stark's ultimate, "Metralleta," deals immense damage and fears all enemies on the map for 5 seconds.
- Optimal placement is crucial for Stark to maximize his solo damage buff.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="vczEhxH4moU" title="Paradox Unit Evolution Showcase… This Is OP! Anime Paradox" />

Stark (Resurreccion) stands out as the strongest unit in the game, boasting exceptional health, damage, and range. He effectively covers the entire map, aggressively pursuing enemies rather than relying on a static AoE. His "Metralleta" ultimate is a devastating nuke, capable of wiping out almost anything on the level and significantly chunking boss HP. Sid (Atomic), a Banner Secret unit, is equally impressive, ranking among the top three best units. Once fully upgraded to "All Range Atomic," Sid also hits the entire map with massive Full AoE DPS and incredible range, making him one of the game's tankiest units.

<Callout type="tip" title="Pro Evolution Tip">
When evolving units like Stark or Sid, pay close attention to the required essences. Some units might gain stat increases upon evolution, while others primarily unlock new abilities. Always check if the game has fixed any previous bugs regarding stat growth during evolution to ensure maximum gains.
</Callout>

Here's a comparison of the top Paradox and Secret units:

| Unit | Type | Key Strengths | Ultimate Ability | Best Trait |
| :--- | :--- | :------------ | :--------------- | :--------- |
| **Stark (Resurreccion)** | Paradox | Highest damage, map-wide chase, tanky | Metralleta (Massive AoE nuke, Fear) | Eternal, Vampiric |
| **Sid (Atomic)** | Secret | Full AoE DPS, massive range, tanky | I Am Atomic (Map-wide devastation) | Eternal, Vampiric |
| Sun Jin Wu (Monarch) | Secret | Powerful DPS, on-kill stacking, lifesteal | Monarch's Authority | Greed, Eternal |
| Igrus (Elite Knight) | Secret | Damage buff on-kill, self-heal, bleed | Elite Knight's Fury | Eternal, Swift |

</Section>

<Section icon={Scroll} title="Unlocking Power: Codes & Rerolls">

Freebies can significantly accelerate your progress in **Anime Paradox Roblox**. Codes provide valuable resources like gems for gacha pulls and trait rerolls to fine-tune your units' powers. Regularly checking for new codes is a smart strategy to enhance your squad without spending Robux. Redeeming codes is a straightforward process, but accuracy is key.

**Video Highlights: Obtaining Cid & Reroll Strategy**
- Obtaining a 0.004% unit like Cid is incredibly rare, often requiring luck pots and numerous pulls.
- Trait rerolls are crucial for optimizing a unit's performance, aiming for top traits like Eternal or Vampiric.
- The video showcases the difficulty and cost associated with getting desired traits, highlighting the value of free rerolls from codes.
- Essence farming and crafting are essential components of unit evolution, alongside obtaining the unit itself.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="pyBL-gRsdbw" title="My LUCKIEST 0.004% Unit Ever! | Obtaining Cid Kagenou In Anime Paradox!" />

Here are the active **Anime Paradox codes** for February 2026:

| Code | Reward | Status |
| :--- | :----- | :----- |
| **15KLIKES!** | 5k Gems, 20 Stat Chips, 10 Super Stat Chips | New! |
| **1MVISITS!** | 3.5k Gems, 20 Trait Rerolls | New! |
| **RELEASE!** | 500 Gems | Active |
| **1KLIKES!** | 250 Gems | Active |
| **2.5KLIKES** | 250 Gems | Active |
| **5KLIKES** | 500 Gems | Active |
| **10KCCU** | 500 Gems, 5 Trait Rerolls | Active |
| **SORRYCODE** | 15k Gems, 35 Trait Rerolls | Active |

<Callout type="warning" title="Code Expiration Alert">
Codes are case-sensitive and must be entered exactly as shown. Double-check for extra spaces. Expired codes will not work, so redeem them promptly! We regularly update our list to ensure you have the latest working codes.
</Callout>

Follow these simple steps to redeem your **Anime Paradox codes**:

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Launch the Game">
    Open **Anime Paradox** in Roblox and ensure you are connected to a server.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Reach Level Five">
    You must reach at least **Level 5** in the game to unlock the code redemption feature.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Access Codes Menu">
    On the right side of your screen, locate and click the **'Codes'** button.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Enter Your Code">
    Type or paste your desired code into the input field. Ensure there are no leading or trailing spaces.
  </Step>
  <Step num="5" title="Redeem Rewards">
    Click the **'Redeem Code'** button. If the code is valid, your rewards will appear on the right side of your screen.
  </Step>
</Steps>

For more codes and updates, consider joining the official Anime Paradox Discord server. Developers often announce new codes for milestones or game updates there.

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Anime Paradox Tier List: Best Units for 2026">

A well-rounded team is crucial for tackling the diverse challenges in **Anime Paradox Roblox**. Our tier list for 2026, assuming optimal evolution and best-rolled stats, helps you identify which units to prioritize for investment. While Paradox and Secret units dominate the Meta, several Mythic and even beginner units offer significant value.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Meta Units">
    - **Stark (Resurreccion)**: Unmatched damage, range, and boss nuke.
    - **Sid (Atomic)**: Full AoE, tanky, map-wide devastation.
  </Card>
  <Card title="S-Tier DPS">
    - **Sun Jin Wu (Monarch)**: Powerful stack-based DPS, synergizes with Igrus.
    - **Igrus (Elite Knight)**: Damage buff on-kill, self-heal, bleed, complements SJW.
  </Card>
  <Card title="A-Tier DPS & Support">
    - **Brolu (Super)**: Excellent AoE Mythic, stack-based damage.
    - **Oreheme**: Best pure healer, crucial for high-difficulty modes.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

The Meta is currently dominated by **Stark (Resurreccion)** and **Sid (Atomic)** due to their unparalleled map presence and damage output. However, S-Tier units like **Sun Jin Wu (Monarch)** and **Igrus (Elite Knight)**, especially when paired, can rival their power in longer game modes like Infinite.

<Callout type="success" title="Strategic Unit Acquisition">
While aiming for Meta units is ideal, don't overlook strong S-Tier or A-Tier units that can carry you through content. Units like Brolu (Super) offer massive AoE damage, while Oreheme provides essential healing, forming a balanced team.
</Callout>

Here's a summary of key units and their roles:

| Unit Name | Tier | Category | Key Strengths | Notes |
| :-------- | :--- | :------- | :------------ | :---- |
| **Stark (Resurreccion)** | Meta | Paradox | Highest DPS, map-wide AoE, boss nuke | The strongest unit in the game, excels everywhere. |
| **Sid (Atomic)** | Meta | Secret | Full map AoE, tanky, consistent damage | Top 3 unit, devastates enemies with Atomic Malstrom. |
| Sun Jin Wu (Monarch) | S | Secret | On-kill stacking DPS, lifesteal, execute | Becomes Meta with Igrus, great for Infinite. |
| Igrus (Elite Knight) | S | Secret | Damage stacking, self-heal, bleed, SJW synergy | Strong standalone, but boosts SJW significantly. |
| Brolu (Super) | A | Mythic | Massive AoE damage, stack-based | Takes time to ramp up, but offers excellent AoE DPS. |
| Oreheme | A | Mythic | Pure healing, shields | Best healer for raw healing, vital for survivability. |
| Ciel (Super) | Beginner | Mythic | Easy EVO, stacks damage/HP, self-heals | Best beginner unit, good for early progression. |

</Section>

<Section icon={Gem} title="Farming Essentials: Gems & Evolution Materials">

Efficiently farming resources is fundamental to progressing in **Anime Paradox Roblox**. Gems are your primary currency for gacha pulls, while evolution materials are necessary to upgrade your units. Knowing the best farming spots and methods will save you considerable time and effort in 2026.

<Callout type="info" title="Daily & Weekly Farming Reset">
Challenges and certain daily quests often provide valuable essences and gems. Ensure you complete these whenever they refresh to maximize your resource gain. The AFK Chamber is also a passive source of units and materials.
</Callout>

Here are the recommended methods for farming Gems and other essential materials:

| Resource Type | Recommended Farming Method | Notes | Estimated Yield/Time |
| :------------ | :------------------------- | :---- | :------------------- |
| **Gems** | Infinite Mode (Reset on Wave 6) | Quickest method for consistent gem income. | 50 Gems every 1:20 minutes |
| **Gems** | Story Mode Nightmare | Great for account EXP, unit EXP, food, Gold, and Gems. | Varies, high overall rewards |
| **Gems** | Legend Stage (Ichigo) | Chance for Ichigo unit, also yields Gold, EXP, Food, Green Essence. | 2% Ichigo chance, ~4:20 completion |
| **Essences** | Merchant Shop | Buy specific essences using Gold; refreshes every hour. | Varies based on merchant stock |
| **Essences** | Daily/Weekly Challenges | Guarantees specific essence types upon completion. | Reliable, but limited attempts |
| **Green Essence** | Legend Stage (Ichigo) | Consistent drops, used for crafting other essences. | Good for bulk farming |
| **Other Essences** | Crafting | Use Green Essence to craft higher-tier essences. | Cost-effective for specific needs |

Evolution materials, specifically essences, are crucial for advancing your units. While you can farm Green Essence, crafting is often necessary for rarer types.

| Essence Type | Crafting Requirement (from Green Essence) |
| :----------- | :--------------------------------------- |
| Blue Essence | 5 Green Essence |
| Purple Essence | 10 Green Essence |
| Yellow Essence | 15 Green Essence |
| Rainbow Essence | 20 Green Essence |
| Red Essence | 30 Green Essence |

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Progression & Advanced Strategies">

Beyond raw power, strategic thinking is vital for mastering **Anime Paradox Roblox**. Effective unit placement, understanding synergies, and setting clear progression goals will elevate your gameplay. Even with powerful units, a poorly structured team or mismanaged resources can lead to defeat.

<Checklist
  id="progression-goals-2026"
  title="Essential Progression Milestones for 2026:"
  items={[
    "Complete all Story Mode difficulties for initial rewards and EXP.",
    "Reach Player Level 50 to unlock all game features and unit slots.",
    "Obtain at least one S-Tier or Meta unit for endgame content.",
    "Optimize your main DPS unit with an Eternal or Vampiric trait.",
    "Consistently farm Infinite Mode for gems and rerolls.",
    "Join the official Discord for community tips and giveaway alerts."
  ]}
/>

Team composition should always consider unit roles. A balanced team typically includes a strong DPS unit, a reliable healer, and potentially a crowd control or tank unit. Units like Oreheme are invaluable for their raw healing power, ensuring your front-line DPS units can sustain damage. Similarly, understanding the unique buffs and debuffs your units apply can create powerful synergies, such as Igrus boosting Sun Jin Wu.

| Team Role | Recommended Units | Key Benefits |
| :-------- | :---------------- | :----------- |
| **Main DPS** | Stark, Sid, Sun Jin Wu | High damage output, map control, boss melting |
| **Support DPS** | Igrus, Brolu | Additional damage, buffs, synergy with main DPS |
| **Healer** | Oreheme, Idol | Sustain, shields, cooldown reduction for allies |
| **Utility/Tank** | Shadow Vampire, Seth | Crowd control, minor DPS, situational buffs/debuffs |

<Callout type="tip" title="Optimal Unit Placement">
For units like Stark, placing them strategically to trigger their solo damage buffs can drastically increase their effectiveness. Experiment with placement in Infinite Mode to find optimal spots that maximize your unit's unique abilities and range.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "What are the best units in Anime Paradox Roblox for 2026?",
    answer: "The best units in Anime Paradox for 2026 are generally considered to be **Stark (Resurreccion)** and **Sid (Atomic)**. Both are top-tier Paradox/Secret units offering immense damage, range, and unique abilities that dominate endgame content."
  },
  {
    question: "How do I get more trait rerolls in Anime Paradox?",
    answer: "You can obtain trait rerolls through several methods: redeeming **active codes** (like '1MVISITS!'), completing daily and weekly challenges, and occasionally purchasing them from the Merchant using in-game currency. These are crucial for optimizing your units."
  },
  {
    question: "Is it worth evolving beginner units in Anime Paradox?",
    answer: "Yes, it is highly recommended to evolve beginner units, especially **Ciel (Super)**. He is easy to evolve and provides decent DPS, self-healing, and speed buffs at max stacks, making him an excellent choice for early-game progression before you acquire more powerful Mythic or Paradox units."
  },
  {
    question: "Where can I find the latest Anime Paradox codes?",
    answer: "The latest **Anime Paradox codes** are frequently released by developers for milestones or updates. You can find them on our updated guide, the official Anime Paradox Discord server, or developer Lunmei's community group page. Always check for new codes to get free gems and rerolls."
  }
]} />

</Section>
